results.title: DropPR Converts Short-Form Video Into Search-Indexable Press Articles
results.description: Atlanta, JUNE 7, 2026 —DropPR’s core product transcribes a short-form video, extracts the factual claims a creator makes about a product, and produces a press-style article suitable for distribution. The output reads as editorial rather than advertising and preserves attribution...
